who: logistics managers at e-commerce companies processing 50–100 shipments/week
offer: For logistics managers at e-commerce companies processing 50–100 shipments/week, inconsistent shipping performance causes delayed deliveries. We provide performance monitoring instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent shipping performance leading to delayed deliveries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics managers with demo video
Community forums where logistics managers share tools
try_it: Let users try Weekly performance reports and Exception alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
